mapper.insert: insert into campaign_decisions (id, campaign_id, user_id, decision, user_segment, user_age_group, user_region, decided_at) values (#{decision.id}, #{decision.campaignId}, #{decision.userId}, #{decision.decision}, #{decision.userSegment}, #{decision.userAgeGroup}, #{decision.userRegion}, #{decision.decidedAt, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler})
mapper.select: select * from campaign_decisions where campaign_id = #{campaignId} order by decided_at desc
select count(*) from campaign_decisions where campaign_id = #{campaignId}
select count(*) from campaign_decisions where campaign_id = #{campaignId} and decision = #{decision}
select cd.decision as decision, count(*) as cnt from campaign_decisions cd join campaigns c on cd.campaign_id = c.id where c.archived = 0 group by cd.decision
